case_title: PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES VS. TODD LEINEKS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEINEKS, TODD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 810 GONZALEZ DRIVE, #3-M CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ( SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LEINEKS, TODD

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LEINEKS, TODD DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED INVESTORS PROPERTIES LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-23-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
